economic_notes: Nation receives 43.8% of revenue from ISC. Involved in Amik Logging Limited Partnership (99.99% owned) which holds 51% JV interest in Amik Nuna Forestry Services. Holds interest in Shekak Power generating facility and Landmark Inn Limited Partnership. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 18, 2020 with uncertain future impact. OFNLP gaming revenue expected to decrease from April 2021 due to COVID-19.
notes: Consolidated entities include Constance Lake First Nation Band and Constance Lake Education Authority. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method include Amik Logging Limited Partnership and 2500845 Ontario Inc. ISC funding calculated as Fixed Funding + Grant Funding + Set Funding + Recovery + Health = 9554156+456650+0-398304+2021857 = 11634359 (approximate). Total government transfers include ISC, CMHC, ISC Health, OFNLP, and Province of Ontario. Shekak Power Corporation revenue of $2,479,301 is a significant component of Other Revenue (down from $8,442,866 in 2019). No schedule of remuneration provided. Amik LP awarded equipment and assumed liabilities of $63,065 pursuant to a settlement agreement subsequent to year end. COVID-19 pandemic noted as significant event.
